_comment: DO NOT MODIFY THIS FILE. EVERY CHANGES CAN CAUSE THE EGG NOT WORKING PROPERLY.
name: Amazon Corretto
author: SSdaRealest (ssdarealeast@proton.me)
description: Production-ready Amazon Corretto egg for Pterodactyl Panel. High perfomance, flexible & easy to use.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Amazon Corretto (Universal) Installation Script

cd /mnt/server || exit 1

# Detect selected Java version from DOCKER_IMAGE variable provided by Pterodactyl
JAVA_VERSION=$(echo "${DOCKER_IMAGE}" | sed -n 's/.*corretto-\([0-9]*\)-pterodactyl.*/\1/p')
if [ -z "${JAVA_VERSION}" ]; then
    JAVA_VERSION="selected"
fi

echo "========================================"
echo "Amazon Corretto Server Installation"
echo "Selected Image : ${DOCKER_IMAGE}"
echo "Java Version   : Java ${JAVA_VERSION}"
echo "========================================"

# Download server JAR if SERVER_JARFILE is a URL
if [[ "${SERVER_JARFILE}" == http* ]]; then
    echo "Downloading server JAR from: ${SERVER_JARFILE}"
    curl -sSL -o server.jar "${SERVER_JARFILE}"
    echo "Download complete!"
else
    echo "SERVER_JARFILE is set to '${SERVER_JARFILE}'."
    echo "If it is not a direct URL, please upload your JAR file manually to: ${SERVER_JARFILE}"
fi

# Accept EULA if enabled
if [[ "${AUTO_EULA}" == "1" ]] || [[ "${AUTO_EULA}" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "eula=true" > eula.txt
    echo "Minecraft EULA automatically accepted (eula.txt)."
fi

echo "========================================"
echo "Installation complete for Java ${JAVA_VERSION}!"
echo "========================================"

variables.name: Server JAR File
variables.description: The name of the server JAR file or URL to download it from.

variables.name: Server Memory
variables.description: The amount of memory (in MB) to allocate to the server.

variables.name: Java Arguments
variables.description: Additional JVM arguments to pass to Java.

variables.name: Server Arguments
variables.description: Additional arguments to pass to the server JAR.

variables.name: Auto Accept EULA
variables.description: Automatically accept the Minecraft EULA during installation.
